description: 60-second interactive demo showcasing Carrier MVP Use Case 1: AI-powered Customer Service Case Triage Agent Swarm with live Salesforce integration

persona.name: Jennifer Martinez
persona.title: Service Operations Manager
persona.context: Oversees case queue management for Commercial HVAC service. Responsible for SLA compliance and case routing optimization across 3 regional service teams.

agents_utilized.name: CarrierSFCaseMonitor
agents_utilized.purpose: Monitors Salesforce for new and aging cases requiring triage

agents_utilized.name: CarrierAttachmentProcessor
agents_utilized.purpose: Extracts information from images and documents using GPT-4 Vision

agents_utilized.name: CarrierCaseAnalyzer
agents_utilized.purpose: AI-powered text analysis for issue classification and urgency detection

agents_utilized.name: CarrierProductEnrichment
agents_utilized.purpose: Enriches cases with product specs, warranty status, and service history

agents_utilized.name: CarrierSummaryGenerator
agents_utilized.purpose: Generates actionable triage summaries with routing recommendations

agents_utilized.name: CarrierSFWriter
agents_utilized.purpose: Writes triage results back to Salesforce custom fields

agents_utilized.name: CarrierCaseTriageOrchestrator
agents_utilized.purpose: Master orchestrator coordinating all 6 agents in the triage workflow

design_principles.visual_elements: 1 status indicator OR 1 table per response
design_principles.source_attribution: Compact format at end with Source and Agents
design_principles.evergreen_language: Relative timeframes only (today, yesterday, X days)
design_principles.call_to_action: Clear next question to continue flow

business_value.problem: Customer service cases sit untriaged for hours, increasing SLA risk and driving unnecessary inbound call volume. Manual triage takes 15+ minutes per case.
business_value.solution: AI-powered agent swarm automatically triages cases in under 5 minutes, extracting key information, enriching with product context, and routing to appropriate teams.
business_value.roi_summary: 85% reduction in triage time, 80% reduction in SLA misses, $2.4M annual savings in labor costs

conversation_flow.title: Check Case Queue
conversation_flow.description: Service manager checks the morning case queue status
conversation_flow.user_message: Good morning! Show me the case queue status
conversation_flow.agent_response:
Good morning, Jennifer! 📥 **Case Queue Status**

I've scanned your Salesforce queue. Here's the current situation:

| Status | Count | Oldest |
|--------|-------|--------|
| 🔴 New (Untriaged) | 5 | 2 hours ago |
| 🟡 Aging (>4 hours) | 3 | 6 hours ago |
| 🟢 Triaged Today | 12 | - |

**Priority Alerts:**
- 2 Enterprise accounts with open cases
- 1 case mentions "not cooling" - potential urgent
- 1 case has image attachment (error code photo)

**Recommendation:** Run AI triage on the 5 new cases to prevent SLA risk.

*Source: Salesforce Service Cloud | Agent: CarrierSFCaseMonitor*

Would you like me to **run AI triage on these cases** now?

conversation_flow.title: Run AI Triage
conversation_flow.description: Manager triggers AI triage on new cases
conversation_flow.user_message: Yes, run AI triage on the new cases
conversation_flow.agent_response:
🎯 **Running AI Triage Workflow...**

Processing 5 cases through the 6-agent swarm:

```
✅ Step 1: Case Monitor      - Retrieved case details
✅ Step 2: Attachment Scan   - 1 image processed (E47 error)
✅ Step 3: AI Text Analysis  - Issue types classified  
✅ Step 4: Product Enrichment - Warranty & history added
✅ Step 5: Summary Generated  - Routing recommendations
✅ Step 6: Salesforce Updated - Custom fields written
```

**Results Summary:**

| Case | Issue Type | Priority | Routing |
|------|------------|----------|----------|
| 00001028 | Password Reset | Low | Self-Service |
| 00001027 | Equipment Error | High | Field Service |
| 00001002 | Installation | Medium | Tech Support |
| 00001016 | Maintenance | Medium | Parts Team |
| 00001024 | Design Issue | Medium | Engineering |

⏱️ **Total time: 18 seconds** (vs 75+ minutes manual)

*Source: AI Triage Pipeline | Agents: Full Swarm (7 agents)*

Want to **see details on the high-priority case**?

conversation_flow.title: Review High-Priority Case
conversation_flow.description: Deep dive into the high-priority case details
conversation_flow.user_message: Yes, show me details on case 00001027
conversation_flow.agent_response:
🔍 **Case 00001027 - AI Triage Analysis**

**Customer:** Desert Sun Properties (Enterprise Tier)
**Equipment:** RTU Model 50XC (Serial: 2419G12345)
**Issue:** Rooftop unit not cooling, E47 error code

---

**📎 Attachment Analysis:**
- Photo shows E47 error on control panel
- AI detected: Low superheat condition
- Relevant bulletin: SB-2024-047 (TXV sensing bulb)

**🔧 Product Context:**
- Install Date: March 2021
- Warranty: ❌ Expired (June 2024)
- Service History: 2 prior visits (refrigerant leak repaired 2023)

**🎯 AI Recommendation:**
- **Priority:** High (business impact + enterprise account)
- **Issue Type:** Equipment Failure - Refrigeration
- **Route to:** Field Service - Commercial
- **Action:** Dispatch technician for TXV diagnosis
- **Estimate:** Same-day dispatch, 2-4 hour repair

*Source: Salesforce + Product DB | Agents: Analyzer, Enrichment, Summary*

Shall I **show the triage summary that was written to Salesforce**?

conversation_flow.title: View Salesforce Updates
conversation_flow.description: Show the custom fields updated in Salesforce
conversation_flow.user_message: Yes, show me what was written to Salesforce
conversation_flow.agent_response:
💾 **Salesforce Case Record Updated**

The following custom triage fields were automatically populated:

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `Triage_Status__c` | Completed |
| `Triage_Priority__c` | High |
| `Triage_Issue_Type__c` | Equipment Failure |
| `Triage_Summary__c` | RTU not cooling with E47 error... |
| `Recommended_Action__c` | Dispatch technician for TXV diagnosis |
| `Recommended_Queue__c` | Field Service - Commercial |
| `AI_Triaged_Date__c` | 2026-01-21T20:22:10Z |

**Internal Comment Added:**
> *AI Triage: High priority equipment failure. Enterprise customer Desert Sun Properties. E47 error detected from attachment image. Warranty expired. Recommend same-day dispatch.*

✅ Case is now ready for Field Service team pickup.

*Source: Salesforce REST API | Agent: CarrierSFWriter*

Would you like to **see the KPI impact** of AI triage?

conversation_flow.title: Review KPI Impact
conversation_flow.user_message: Yes, show me the KPI impact
conversation_flow.agent_response:
📊 **AI Triage KPI Dashboard**

**Today's Performance:**

| Metric | Before AI | With AI | Improvement |
|--------|-----------|---------|-------------|
| Avg Triage Time | 4.2 hours | 18 sec | **99.9%** |
| Cases Triaged | 15/day | 100+/day | **6.7x** |
| SLA Miss Rate | 23% | 2% | **91%** |
| Manual Effort | 15 min/case | 0 min | **100%** |

**Monthly Projection:**
- 🕐 **2,400 hours saved** in manual triage
- 💰 **$200K/month** in labor savings
- 📈 **95% SLA compliance** (up from 77%)
- 😊 **NPS improvement** from faster response

**Agent Utilization Today:**
- Cases processed: 17
- Attachments analyzed: 4
- Products enriched: 12
- Salesforce writes: 17

*Source: Analytics Dashboard | Agent: Orchestrator Metrics*

Want to see a **summary of all agents in the swarm**?

conversation_flow.title: Agent Swarm Summary
conversation_flow.description: Closing with full agent swarm overview
conversation_flow.user_message: Yes, show me all the agents
conversation_flow.agent_response:
🤖 **Carrier Case Triage Agent Swarm**

**7 Specialized AI Agents Working Together:**

| Agent | Role | Integration |
|-------|------|-------------|
| 📥 SF Case Monitor | Detect new/aging cases | Salesforce SOQL |
| 📎 Attachment Processor | Extract from images/docs | GPT-4 Vision |
| 🔍 Case Analyzer | Classify issues & urgency | Azure OpenAI |
| 🔧 Product Enrichment | Add warranty & history | Product API |
| 📝 Summary Generator | Create triage summary | AI Pipeline |
| 💾 SF Writer | Update Salesforce fields | REST API |
| 🎯 Orchestrator | Coordinate full workflow | RAPP Framework |

**Architecture Highlights:**
- Runs on Azure Functions (serverless)
- Real-time Salesforce integration
- Custom fields for triage data
- Scalable to 1000s of cases/day

**Demo Complete!** ✅

This is Carrier MVP Use Case 1 - ready for pilot deployment.

*Built with: RAPP Agent Framework + Azure + Salesforce*

Questions about implementation or next steps?

one_pager.title: Carrier AI Case Triage Agent Swarm
one_pager.subtitle: MVP Use Case 1 - Customer Service Automation
one_pager.value_proposition: Automatically triage service cases in under 5 minutes with AI-powered analysis, reducing SLA risk by 80% and eliminating manual effort
key_features: AI-powered issue classification and urgency detection
Product enrichment with warranty and service history
Custom field updates written back to Salesforce

check_queue.description: Get real case queue status from Salesforce

triage_single.description: Run full triage on a specific case
